mapper.select:
SELECT
DISTINCT
r.*, s.code AS stockCode, s.name AS stockName, b.code AS blockCode, b.name AS blockName
FROM base_block_rela_stock r LEFT JOIN base_stock s ON r.stock_id = s.id LEFT JOIN base_block b ON r.block_id = b.id
b.code IN
#{blockCode}

SELECT
DISTINCT
r.*, s.code AS stockCode, s.name AS stockName, b.code AS blockCode, b.name AS blockName
FROM base_block_rela_stock r LEFT JOIN base_stock s ON r.stock_id = s.id LEFT JOIN base_block b ON r.block_id = b.id
s.code IN
#{stockCode}

SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.code, b.name, b.code_path, b.name_path, b.type, b.parent_id, b.level, b.end_level
FROM base_block_rela_stock r LEFT JOIN base_stock s ON r.stock_id = s.id LEFT JOIN base_block b ON r.block_id = b.id
WHERE s.code = #{stockCode}
ORDER BY b.id ASC

SELECT
DISTINCT
b.id, b.code, b.name, b.code_path, b.name_path, b.parent_id, b.type, b.level, b.end_level, b.trade_date, b.open, b.high, b.low, b.close, b.prev_close, b.volume, b.amount, b.range_pct, b.change_pct, b.change_price, b.turnover_pct,
b.gmt_create, b.gmt_modify
FROM base_block_rela_stock r LEFT JOIN base_stock s ON r.stock_id = s.id LEFT JOIN base_block b ON r.block_id = b.id
s.code IN
#{stockCode}
ORDER BY b.id ASC

SELECT
DISTINCT
s.id, s.code, s.name, s.type, s.tdx_market_type, s.trade_date, s.open, s.high, s.low, s.close, s.prev_close, s.volume, s.amount, s.range_pct, s.change_pct, s.change_price, s.turnover_pct,
s.gmt_create, s.gmt_modify
FROM base_block_rela_stock r LEFT JOIN base_stock s ON r.stock_id = s.id LEFT JOIN base_block b ON r.block_id = b.id
b.code IN
#{blockCode}
ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT r.*,
s.code AS stockCode, s.name AS stockName,
b.code AS blockCode, b.name AS blockName
FROM base_block_rela_stock r LEFT JOIN base_stock s ON r.stock_id = s.id LEFT JOIN base_block b ON r.block_id = b.id
